variables.notes: 'Operating Expenses' equals the sum of Other operating expenses + Cost of Goods and Services Sold + Personnel expenses, which indicates D&A is presented outside the selected COGS row. However, the excerpt provides only a total operating D&A line and no COGS-specific D&A breakout, so adding it to COGS would risk misallocation and double counting.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket (Other operating expenses + Personnel expenses) appears to exclude the separate D&A line, because those rows sum exactly to the 'Operating Expenses' subtotal before D&A. But the excerpt does not allocate total D&A between COGS and SG&A, and the only R&D-specific amortization row is blank. Conservative output is no separate XSGA_DA selection pending manual review.
